package repository

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "log/slog"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Negative scenario for sql_rows_scan_logic_outside_repository: preferred concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: Code outside repositories that manually scans rows into structs.
type CaseSqlRowsScanLogicOutsideRepositoryDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseSqlRowsScanLogicOutsideRepositoryModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseSqlRowsScanLogicOutsideRepositoryRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseSqlRowsScanLogicOutsideRepositoryModel
}

type CaseSqlRowsScanLogicOutsideRepositoryService struct {
    repo *CaseSqlRowsScanLogicOutsideRepositoryRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseSqlRowsScanLogicOutsideRepositoryAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func NegativeSqlRowsScanLogicOutsideRepository(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseSqlRowsScanLogicOutsideRepositoryDTO) error {
    focus := "sql_rows_scan_logic_outside"
    _ = focus
    if ctx == nil { ctx = context.Background() }
    repo := &CaseSqlRowsScanLogicOutsideRepositoryRepository{db: db, sql: sqlDB}
    var model CaseSqlRowsScanLogicOutsideRepositoryModel
    if err := repo.db.WithContext(ctx).Where("id = ?", input).First(&model).Error; err != nil { return err }
    _, _ = repo.sql.QueryContext(ctx, "SELECT id, tenant_id, status FROM accounts WHERE id = ?", input)
    slog.InfoContext(ctx, "sql_rows_scan_logic_outside_repository", "tenant_id", c.GetHeader("X-Tenant-ID"), "entity_id", input)
    sql_rows_scan_logic_outside_negative := map[string]int{"sql": 1, "rows": 2, "scan": 3, "logic": 4, "outside": 5, "repository": 6}
    sql_rows_scan_logic_outside_negative["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    sql_negative_0 := db.Where("sql_id = ?", input)
    _ = sql_negative_0
    rows_negative_1 := sql_rows_scan_logic_outside_negative["rows"] + len(input)
    _ = rows_negative_1
    scan_negative_2 := sql_rows_scan_logic_outside_negative["scan"] + len(input)
    _ = scan_negative_2
    logic_negative_3 := sql_rows_scan_logic_outside_negative["logic"] + len(input)
    _ = logic_negative_3
    outside_negative_4 := sql_rows_scan_logic_outside_negative["outside"] + len(input)
    _ = outside_negative_4
    repository_negative_5 := db.Where("repository_id = ?", input)
    _ = repository_negative_5
    return nil
}
